skills.name: Dragontooth
skills.description: Rotate your spear using centrifugal force to attack an enemy. Spear attacks increase critical damage and two-handed spear attacks ignore 15% of the enemy's defense.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x6
Final damage increased by +10% when critical attack occurs

skills.name: Serpentine
skills.description: Use your spear to deliver continuous attacks to enemies in front of you. Applies critical to enemies affected by immobility or reduced movement speed debuffs.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 7
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Gae Bulg
skills.description: Attack several enemies within range by throwing the spear.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Dragon Soar
skills.description: Vault into the air while swinging your spear upwards. Attacked enemies become shocked. Enemies affected by either [Slow] or [Immobile] have their defense partially ignored.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
[Shock] Duration: 5 seconds
Enemies affected by [Slow] or [Immobile]have their Defense ignored by 15%

skills.name: Dethrone
skills.description: Pierce enemies in front of you with the spear and incapacitate their movements. The skill decreases both movement speed and attack speed of boss monsters.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
[Trap] Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds
Boss Monster Debuff Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Dragon Fall
skills.description: Fly up to the sky, then shoot down to a specified point in the surface to deliver powerful damage over a wide range. Hits 12 times against [Slow] or [Immobile] targets.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Dragonoid
skills.description: Gather all power by wearing the Dragoon armor. Movement Speed during the buff increases, final damage increases when attacking the enemy, and cannot be Blocked or Evaded if it is Dragoon skill. Damage received decreases by 25% during the buff.
skills.effect_text:
Movement Speed increases by 5
Skill final damage increases by CaptionRatio %
Duration 15 seconds
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Dragon Fear
skills.description: Apply [Dragon Fear] to a nearby enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Debuff Duration: CaptionRatio seconds
Target: CaptionRatio2
debuff movement speed - CaptionRatio3 %

attributes.name: Spear Expertise: Destroy Magic Circle
attributes.description:
* Stack 1 [Destroy Magic Circle] Buff per 1 second when moving

* 1 [Destroy Magic Circle] Buff stack reduced per 1 second when standing

* Destroy 1 magic circle when using Spear Throw, Steed Charge, Gae Bulg during 10 stack.

attributes.name: Dragontooth: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dragontooth] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Serpentine: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Serpentine] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

* Increases the skill factor of [Dragon Soar] by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Dethrone: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dethrone] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dethrone: Remove Knockback
attributes.description:
* Removes knockback effect from [Dehtrone]

* Only applies if attribute is set to ON

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Dragon Fall: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Dragon Fall] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Dragon Soar: Ascension
attributes.description:
* Doubles the number of hits of [Dragon Soar]

* Increases SP consumption by 150%

attributes.name: [Arts] Dragon Fall: Death From Above
attributes.description: * After using [Dragon Fall], you no longer move to the targeted position, but instead jump and throw your spear at the location, dealing damage to enemies and then returning to your original position.

attributes.name: [Arts] Dragon Tooth: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Dragontooth] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Dragontooth: Long Canine
attributes.description:
*Adds 1 second of casting time to [Dragontooth]skill

* Changes Overheat to 1 time, increases AoE Attack Ratio by 20

* Increases skill final damage by 200%

*Increases Strike length by 80%

* Increases cooldown by 5 seconds
